raw_response:
{
  "current_life_events": "This week the client asked for a last‑minute redesign of the brand assets, pushing him to work late into the night. His thyroid medication was recently adjusted, leaving him feeling unusually sluggish and making it hard to stick to his gym routine. He also noticed a slight weight gain after skipping a few workouts, which has made him uneasy about his appearance.",
  "mental_state": "He’s feeling exhausted and on edge, worried that his health changes might affect his work performance and self‑image.",
  "mood": "anxious and self‑conscious",
  "emotions": ["anxious", "frustrated", "self-conscious"],
  "resistance_cooperation_level": "medium",
  "currently_active_problems": ["health_anxiety", "sleep_problems", "body_image_concerns"],
  "why_bringing_these_up_now": "The recent medication change, combined with the deadline pressure and a visible shift in his body, makes health anxiety, sleep issues, and body image concerns feel immediate and worth discussing."
}

parsed.current_life_events: This week the client asked for a last‑minute redesign of the brand assets, pushing him to work late into the night. His thyroid medication was recently adjusted, leaving him feeling unusually sluggish and making it hard to stick to his gym routine. He also noticed a slight weight gain after skipping a few workouts, which has made him uneasy about his appearance.
